text.title: Error Budget Policy and Freeze Rules Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: declare ship freeze; SRE on-call + service owner authorised
declare freeze; allow security + rollback only
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Burn category triggered freeze threshold? → matches branch "category == fast_burn AND class == user_facing_critical" → conclusion ref=r2-freeze-authorisation-named
